title: Hot weather forecast with fire danger warning for the Karoo
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, hot weather will prevail over the Garden Route, Karoo region on Friday and Saturday.

Here is what you need to know:


> Fire danger warning:


Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over Beaufort West and Laingsburg municipalities today, Friday 16 May.

A heat wave with persistently high temperatures is expected over the Richtersveld municipality in the Northern Cape.

Western CapeMorning fog in places in the south and again in the south-west from the evening, otherwise fine and warm to hot but partly cloudy along the south-coastline. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh north-easterly, reaching strong in places along the west and south coast in the morning, otherwise light to moderate easterly.

It will become moderate to fresh southerly along the south-west and the south-coast from the evening. The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeFine and warm. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate north-easterly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFine and warm. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate north-easterly.

Expected temperatures for Friday 16 May:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
